historys.title: Antonio says Marita is missing
historys.content:
Antonio arrives at the Gryphon: “She’s gone, they took her, you have to find her.” 

He and Marita were going shopping at the market, near the Heights Market. They were supposed to meet at 8:00 or so. When she didn’t show, he ran by her house, which looked like people were in a frenzy. He then went to the Gryphon.
historys.parsedContent:
Antonio arrives at the Gryphon: “She’s gone, they took her, you have to find her.” 

He and Marita were going shopping at the market, near the Heights Market. They were supposed to meet at 8:00 or so. When she didn’t show, he ran by her house, which looked like people were in a frenzy. He then went to the Gryphon.

historys.title: Byelaya Disappears
historys.content: @[Byelaya Tainley](person:fc9ce341-d93f-4d7f-a194-022a4e7ece22) leaves home and becomes the courtesan @[Bianca](person:e63156eb-0dbc-4d4f-acf6-7a26e6af346f), working at @[The Blue Lantern](landmark:c39a381b-8d84-4ac7-aa93-3f280a7f2dba) on @[The Street of Silk Veils](settlement:587a7a3a-ba45-4bfd-94bc-fe6e17ae023c).
historys.parsedContent: Byelaya Tainley leaves home and becomes the courtesan Bianca , working at The Blue Lantern on The Street of Silk Veils .

historys.title: Byelaya/Bianca is spotted
historys.content:
@[Bianca](person:e63156eb-0dbc-4d4f-acf6-7a26e6af346f) goes out to do a little shopping and forgot to wear her veil. 

@[Cortina de la Riis](person:bc9967fb-4969-46fd-94cf-0294e48ffb27), Belaya’s only close friend, spots a girl who closely resembles Byelaya except for the hair color. Cortina, asks her brother @[Thomas](person:76ed1748-d23b-4ba9-ba45-a81721ec4115) to quietly check out the girl.

cf. @[The Nobleman's Daughter](plot:8ff4636a-e1d3-4037-a18a-6acf9f42ad74)
historys.parsedContent: Bianca goes out to do a little shopping and forgot to wear her veil. Cortina de la Riis , Belaya’s only close friend, spots a girl who closely resembles Byelaya except for the hair color. Cortina, asks her brother Thomas to quietly check out the girl. cf. The Nobleman's Daughter

historys.title: Creation of the Haven Irregulars
historys.content: The first official day for this new unit in the Haven City Watch.
historys.alternativeDisplayRange: Starday, the 8th day of Planting, in the year 1172
historys.parsedContent: The first official day for this new unit in the Haven City Watch.

historys.title: Declaration of the 2nd Namori Empire
historys.content: With the surrender of Emor, the Namori Empire completed its western expansion and now spans two continents. In celebration of the event a 2nd Namori Empire is declared and a new calendar era established.
historys.parsedContent: With the surrender of Emor, the Namori Empire completed its western expansion and now spans two continents. In celebration of the event a 2nd Namori Empire is declared and a new calendar era established.

historys.title: Freeing of Haven
historys.content: The Free City of Haven was given its charter as an independent city-state by the crumbling Namori Empire which was retreating to the east.
historys.parsedContent: The Free City of Haven was given its charter as an independent city-state by the crumbling Namori Empire which was retreating to the east.

historys.title: Jillie Disappears
historys.content:
Jillie disappears sometime between leaving work at noon, and 8pm when she was supposed to meet @[Martin](person:ae72d940-a17e-4fbf-8e37-b8beaf2a0ac5).

Reason is not sinister - her mom is sick and she's helping look after 
her.
historys.parsedContent: Jillie disappears sometime between leaving work at noon, and 8pm when she was supposed to meet Martin . Reason is not sinister - her mom is sick and she's helping look after her.

historys.title: Jillie discovered to be missing
historys.content:
On the way they stop by Pirandelli’s to make sure Jillie is there. She isn’t. 

She didn’t come into work today. Martin asks what time she got off work yesterday and is told it was around lunch time.
historys.parsedContent:
On the way they stop by Pirandelli’s to make sure Jillie is there. She isn’t. 

She didn’t come into work today. Martin asks what time she got off work yesterday and is told it was around lunch time.

historys.title: Jillie doesn't show up
historys.content: Jillie was supposed to meet @[Martin](person:ae72d940-a17e-4fbf-8e37-b8beaf2a0ac5) at the @[Gryphon](landmark:29260de7-ef14-4aa9-a123-5d0858f00927) but doesn't show up.
historys.parsedContent: Jillie was supposed to meet Martin at the Gryphon but doesn't show up.

historys.title: Marita has breakfast with  Romano
historys.parsedContent: Marita had breakfast with her brother, Romano

historys.title: Marita is getting ready to go out
historys.content:
Maggie (Maggia maid, elf) reported that she helped get @[Marita](person:7c9dab1a-8221-41ca-83f6-0d3b49331e37) ready to go out shopping - probably on @[Boutique Lane](landmark:6f3e4291-b4ff-4380-afd6-00be23bb479d) (Maggie isn't positive).  She suspects that Marita will go first to @[Pierre Farce's House of Beauty](landmark:9e38e036-acf1-418e-877b-19e8f6346f74).

Marrie reported that Marita was wearing her favourite blue dress and had her @[unicorn pendant](item:dd32fe8d-e097-4c49-9857-99d9048cfbc3) - she rearely goes anywhere without it.

Maggie also suspects that Marita may be meeting with Antonio but doesn't know.
historys.parsedContent: Maggie (Maggia maid, elf) reported that she helped get Marita ready to go out shopping - probably on Boutique Lane (Maggie isn't positive). She suspects that Marita will go first to Pierre Farce's House of Beauty . Marrie reported that Marita was wearing her favourite blue dress and had her unicorn pendant - she rearely goes anywhere without it. Maggie also suspects that Marita may be meeting with Antonio but doesn't know.

historys.title: Marita is Kidnapped
historys.content: @[Marita](person:7c9dab1a-8221-41ca-83f6-0d3b49331e37) is taken somewhere between leaving the house (no later than 2pm) and when she was supposed to meet @[Antonio](person:ec8f50d3-84f6-48a6-95d0-d7d6b5b65cb8) the next morning at 8am.
historys.parsedContent: Marita is taken somewhere between leaving the house (no later than 2pm) and when she was supposed to meet Antonio the next morning at 8am.

historys.title: Marita is supposed to meet Antonio
historys.content: @[Marita](person:7c9dab1a-8221-41ca-83f6-0d3b49331e37) was supposed to meet @[Antonio](person:ec8f50d3-84f6-48a6-95d0-d7d6b5b65cb8) @ 8am but never shows up.
historys.parsedContent: Marita was supposed to meet Antonio @ 8am but never shows up.

historys.title: Marita leaves home
historys.content: Somewhere between 1pm and 2pm, @[Marita](person:7c9dab1a-8221-41ca-83f6-0d3b49331e37) leaves the residence to go shopping.  Nobody in the family saw her leave and all Maggie (the maid) can say is sometime a little while after after 1pm.
historys.parsedContent: Somewhere between 1pm and 2pm, Marita leaves the residence to go shopping. Nobody in the family saw her leave and all Maggie (the maid) can say is sometime a little while after after 1pm.

historys.title: Oliva & Seraphina are discovered missing
historys.content:
Late afternoon (?) the party visits Olivia's shop and discover that she and Seraphina are missing.  There is a Black Hand symbol on the floor in the main room.  

They investigate further and Turin finds Seraphina’s toolkit. Turin finds footprints indicating Seraphina was taken along with  [u]some[/u] of her clothes.
historys.parsedContent:
Late afternoon (?) the party visits Olivia's shop and discover that she and Seraphina are missing.  There is a Black Hand symbol on the floor in the main room.  

They investigate further and Turin finds Seraphina’s toolkit. Turin finds footprints indicating Seraphina was taken along with  <u>some</u> of her clothes.

historys.title: Olivia & Seraphina are kidnapped
historys.content: Seraphona and @[Olivia](person:17bc78d2-213b-481c-8a3b-f2dc64dafe23) were are taken around 10:30pm.
historys.parsedContent: Seraphona and Olivia were are taken around 10:30pm.

historys.title: Olivia & Seraphina last seen
historys.content: They last seen heading to Olivia's shop after the party revisited the Clockwork Tower.
historys.parsedContent: They last seen heading to Olivia's shop after the party revisited the Clockwork Tower.

historys.title: The Burning of Rogue's Roost
historys.content: On this day, the home of the Haven Thieves' Guild, Rogue's Roost, was burned down, leaving the guild homeless.
historys.alternativeDisplayRange: Earthday, the 13th day of Ready'reat, in the year 1171
historys.parsedContent: On this day, the home of the Haven Thieves' Guild, Rogue's Roost, was burned down, leaving the guild homeless.
